# Cadex Systems

> Cadex Systems is an AI integration and automation company that helps businesses unlock operational efficiency through strategic AI implementation, workflow automation, and ongoing optimization with measurable ROI.

## Company

- **Website:** https://www.cadexhq.com
- **Email:** discovery@cadexhq.com
- **Tagline:** AI Integration & Automation Services

## What We Do

Cadex Systems designs and deploys AI-powered automation solutions for small businesses, mid-market companies, and enterprise organizations. We identify where manual work, lost revenue, and missing intelligence layers are costing businesses the most — then build systems to fix it.

## Services

- **AI Integration & Automation:** End-to-end design and deployment of AI workflows across sales, operations, finance, HR, marketing, and customer success
- **AI Readiness Assessment:** A scored evaluation of a business's readiness to implement AI across five categories: data & systems, processes, team, leadership, and current tools
- **Cadex Pre-Audit:** A multi-step intake assessment that identifies the highest-value automation opportunities for a specific business
- **ROI Calculator:** An interactive tool that estimates annual cost savings from automation based on team size, hours wasted, and hourly cost

## Industries Served

- Legal (intake automation, case and expert management)
- Healthcare (dental, medical practices, patient workflows, insurance reconciliation)
- Education (universities, EdTech, program engagement, student and faculty communications)
- Trades & Services (HVAC, plumbers, electricians, restoration, roofing, specialty contractors)
- Professional Services (agencies, consultancies, staffing firms, personal trainers, coaching)
- Financial Services (M&A, wealth management, compliance workflows)
- E-Commerce & Agencies

## Engagement Tiers

- **Small Business:** Owner-operated to growing teams. Fast deployment, no enterprise overhead.
- **Mid-Market:** Organizations scaling beyond founder-led operations. Multi-department automation rollout.
- **Enterprise:** Complex organizational structures with multiple business units. Enterprise-wide AI transformation.
